system_prompt: You are an expert website auditor. Return ONLY compact JSON with keys: ai_insights and recommendations. ai_insights must include seo_structure, messaging_clarity, cta_usage, content_depth, ux_concerns. Each ai_insights field must be under 35 words. recommendations must be 3 items ordered by priority (high to low). Each recommendation item must contain: priority, issue, action, rationale. Keep each recommendation concise. Ground every statement in provided metrics. No markdown. No extra keys.
user_prompt:
Analyze this single-page website audit payload and produce the required JSON only:
{"url":"https://rivindu-ashinsa.github.io/","metrics":{"url":"https://rivindu-ashinsa.github.io/","word_count":36,"heading_counts":{"h1":1,"h2":8,"h3":29},"cta_count":9,"internal_links":2,"external_links":18,"images":14,"images_missing_alt_pct":0.0,"meta_title":"Rivindu Ashinsa | ML Engineer & Data Scientist Portfolio","meta_description":"Rivindu Ashinsa is a Machine Learning Engineer and Data Scientist specializing in AI, deep learning, and predictive analytics. Explore projects, certifications, and achievements."},"text_excerpt":"Rivindu Ashinsa | ML Engineer & Data Scientist Rivindu Ashinsa Machine Learning Engineer & Data Scientist specializing in AI, deep learning, and predictive analytics. Western Province, Sri Lanka Python \u2022 SQL \u2022 Analytics Open to internships"}

metrics.meta_title: Rivindu Ashinsa | ML Engineer & Data Scientist Portfolio
metrics.meta_description: Rivindu Ashinsa is a Machine Learning Engineer and Data Scientist specializing in AI, deep learning, and predictive analytics. Explore projects, certifications, and achievements.

structured_model_input.text_excerpt: Rivindu Ashinsa | ML Engineer & Data Scientist Rivindu Ashinsa Machine Learning Engineer & Data Scientist specializing in AI, deep learning, and predictive analytics. Western Province, Sri Lanka Python • SQL • Analytics Open to internships

raw_model_output: {"ai_insights":{"seo_structure":"Good meta title and description; excessive h3 tags may dilute SEO focus.","messaging_clarity":"Clear professional identity but very limited textual content reduces message depth.","cta_usage":"High number of CTAs (9) but low word count may confuse users or dilute impact.","content_depth":"Extremely low word count (36 words) limits content richness and engagement.","ux_concerns":"Few internal links (2) and many external links (18) may disrupt user flow; good image alt usage."},"recommendations":[{"priority":"high","issue":"Insufficient content depth","action":"Expand textual content to provide detailed information about skills, projects, and experience.","rationale":"36 words is too low for engagement and SEO; richer content improves user understanding and search rankings."},{"priority":"medium","issue":"Overuse of h3 headings","action":"Consolidate or reduce h3 headings to improve content hierarchy and SEO clarity.","rationale":"29 h3 tags overwhelm structure and dilute SEO focus; better heading hierarchy aids readability and SEO."},{"priority":"low","issue":"Imbalanced link distribution","action":"Increase internal links and reduce external links to improve site navigation and user retention.","rationale":"Only 2 internal links limit navigation; 18 external links may lead users away prematurely."}]}
